decisions.summary: Create 5 beads covering all missing inspector parity items
Reuse existing inspector components (ContainerSection, ReviewPipelineSection) where possible to avoid duplication
Thread agent/issue props through ZoneCOverview to OverviewTab so child tabs can access full agent data
WorkspaceData.containers type in queries.ts was incorrectly typed as array — actual API returns Record<string, ContainerStatus>

hazards.summary: OverviewTab uses inline styles while inspector uses Tailwind classes — mixing may look inconsistent
hazards.mitigation: ContainerSection and ReviewPipelineSection render with Tailwind inside inline-styled Section — CSS variables are global so it works visually

resumePoint.description: All 5 beads implemented. Run full test suite, push branch, and call pan done PAN-953.

beadsMapping.workspace-8k4p: Fix Agent tile: show runtime, uptime, workspace path
beadsMapping.workspace-qm53: Add Containers section with right-click menu to OverviewTab
beadsMapping.workspace-nc40: Add Switch Model action to OverviewTab
beadsMapping.workspace-59kw: Add Input/Output token totals to Cost tile

sessionHistory.note: Started PAN-953 implementation. Created 5 beads. Rebased onto latest main. No existing continue file.

Completed workspace-8k4p: threaded agent/issue props through IssueWorkbench→ZoneCOverview→OverviewTab. Fixed Agent tile to show actual runtime harness (getHarness), uptime (formatRuntime), friendly model name, and workspace path. Added workspace path to Workspace tile.

Completed workspace-qm53: fixed WorkspaceData.containers type (Record not array), removed broken container map from WORKSPACE tile, added ContainerSection with right-click context menu (restart/stop/start) to OverviewTab. Added containerControlMutation and refreshDbMutation hooks.
Completed workspace-6sr5: imported ReviewPipelineSection from inspector/ and rendered it as a Section in OverviewTab when review status exists. onViewLog switches to prdiff tab.
Completed workspace-nc40: imported SwitchModelModal and useSwitchModel hook, added Switch Model button to Actions tile when agent exists, rendered modal with agent props.
Completed workspace-59kw: added fmtTokens helper and displayed inputTokens/outputTokens in Cost tile above per-model breakdown.
